objective: Test whether reusable program-generation strategies discovered from calibration examples improve held-out Foofah-style table transformation coverage.

protocol.stage_1: Use Qwen3.5-4B to propose reusable strategy prompts from calibration examples, then freeze the parsed strategy cards.
protocol.stage_2: Generate fresh executable Python transform(table) programs on held-out tasks under the frozen discovered strategy prompts.
protocol.stage_3: Execute generated programs on public examples and held-out targets with a sandboxed runner; compare against direct and fixed baseline records included in this package.
protocol.primary_gate: Discovered strategies should add held-out recoveries over direct answering, and ideally add direct-miss recoveries not already available to the fixed baseline strategy pool.
